use_cases: File upload dropzone visual in cloud storage applications
Folder selection component in document management systems
Storage or asset indicator in dashboard interfaces
File attachment preview in messaging or collaboration tools
Document icon representation in file explorer UIs
ai_summary: A 3D animated folder icon built with CSS perspective transforms and layered card effects. Features amber-colored folder styling with multiple depth layers that rotate on hover to reveal shadows and inner glow effects. The component creates a tactile, dimensional feel ideal for file management, cloud storage, and document handling interfaces.
